The '''E-11 carbine''' was the [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] version of the popular [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. It was popular among [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] soldiers, and also utilized by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] recruit trainees. It was more lightweight than E-11 blaster rifle with a higher rate of fire, but it also had less range and stopping power.
